title: crataegus monogyna subsp. brevispina
intro: Crataegus monogyna subsp. brevispina, also known as hawthorn or May tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna subsp. brevispina include its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and oligomeric proanthocyanidins, which contribute to its cardiovascular and antioxidant benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Crataegus monogyna subsp. brevispina include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
